chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-4235 of 2025 (Muhammad Ahmed Vs. The Secretary Directorate of Labour & Commerce Government of Sindh & others) 27.08.2025 Mr. Matloob Hussain Qureshi, advocate for petitioner O R D E R ---- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Petitioner claims to be President of Madrassah Jamal Al-Quran of Jamia Majsid Siddiqua, Gazdarabad Nanakji Road, Soldier Bazar Karachi has impugned a letter dated 05.08.2025 issued by Inquiry Officer, Directorate of Industries & Commerce, Government of Sindh announcing Membership and Election Schedule on the ground that non-members of the committee, who belong to a different Fiqah have been declared as members and on whose vote the election has been held. However, he has not filed a list of members or articles of association to appreciate his contentions. 2. There is no record either establishing a particular Fiqah of the petitioner and the other members. The learned counsel has admitted that elections have already been held as per schedule announced in the impugned letter. Therefore, there is nothing left to be interfered by this Court. Even otherwise, in the constitutional petition, the Fiqah of a person cannot be determined. We, therefore, find no merits in this petition and accordingly dismiss it along with applications This constitutional petition stands disposed of in above terms along with applications. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA
